note: Every evidence_id a NoeticClaim asserts on must resolve here. Interior subject-level claims resolve only to evidence ABOUT the subject (observation bridge), never to direct interior access.

evidence.provenance: the objection's public wording and immediate context, as received
evidence.relation_to_target: directly evidences the discourse-interpretation claim; only ABOUT (not direct access to) the subject

evidence.provenance: the DAEE runtime Diagnostic-IR whole-state reread trace (field_witness projection)
evidence.relation_to_target: evidences runtime closure; not interior restoration of the subject

evidence.provenance: the released response artifact and its route register
evidence.scope: the response artifact and route only
evidence.relation_to_target: evidences route quality; does not entail uptake
